productDisplayName: Inkfruit Men's The Last War Navy T-shirt
description: CompositionNavy blue round neck short sleeved t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with navy blue fabric tape on the inseam of the necklne and graphic print with lettering on the frontFittingComfortWash care Hand wash separately in cool water at 30 degrees Do not scrub Do not bleach Turn inside out and dry flat in shade Warm iron on reverse Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Do not dry clean This navy blue tee from inkfruit comes with a message of peace and hope.
